rippleForge.heading: Remove carbon at planetary scale with precision

modules.label: Direct Capture
modules.title: Direct air capture at gigaton scale
modules.description: Industrial DAC facilities pull CO₂ straight from ambient air using sorbent filters and low-carbon energy — achieving capture costs below $100/ton by 2030.
modules.alt: Industrial direct air capture facility with green technology

modules.label: Ocean Alkalinity
modules.title: Ocean alkalinity enhancement
modules.description: Safely increase ocean CO₂ uptake by adding alkaline minerals — accelerating natural carbon sequestration while monitoring marine ecosystem health in real time.
modules.alt: Aerial view of ocean with research vessel

modules.label: Methane Watch
modules.title: Satellite methane detection
modules.description: Hyperspectral satellites pinpoint methane leaks from oil, gas, and agriculture within hours — enabling rapid mitigation that prevents 80× more warming than CO₂ per molecule.
modules.alt: Satellite view of Earth showing atmospheric monitoring

modules.label: Carbon Ledger
modules.title: Immutable carbon credit ledger
modules.description: Blockchain-verified carbon credits with full provenance tracing — from capture event to retirement, eliminating double-counting and greenwashing across global markets.

modules.label: Reforest AI
modules.title: AI-guided reforestation
modules.description: Drone swarms and ML models identify optimal planting sites, species mixes, and survival rates — restoring degraded land 10× faster than manual methods.
modules.alt: Lush green forest canopy from aerial view

modules.label: Geo Storage
modules.title: Geological carbon storage
modules.description: Inject captured CO₂ into basalt formations where it mineralizes permanently within two years — the most durable carbon removal method known to science.
modules.alt: Geological rock formations for carbon storage
